author: Icarian Systems
description: Local-first Kanban / project boards. Reads and writes the same on-disk board format used by the community Kanban plugin. Includes optional paid Pro features. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Icarian Systems
manifest.description: Local-first Kanban / project boards. Reads and writes the same on-disk board format used by the community Kanban plugin. Includes optional paid Pro features.
manifest.name: Kanban for Professionals

name: Kanban for Professionals

releases.author: icarian-systems
releases.description:
Completes the "+ Add card" fix. 1.0.8 made the new card render; this release stops it from disappearing a moment later.

### Fixed

- **A newly added card no longer vanishes ~600ms after it appears.** An empty placeholder card serializes to nothing, so it does not survive a serialize→parse round-trip. When the debounced save flushed, Obsidian re-fired \`setViewData\` with the plugin's own bytes; the self-write branch ran \`applyDiskSnapshot\` → \`parseBoard\` (zero cards) → \`setBoard\`, deleting the just-created card out from under the user's open inline editor. The self-write branch now treats a byte-identical echo as a no-op (mirroring the \`onVaultModify\` path) and leaves the in-memory board — including the transient placeholder — untouched. Combined with the 1.0.8 visibility fix, "+ Add card" now reliably opens an editable card that stays put.

### Internal

- Removed a dangling \`react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\` eslint-disable directive in \`Card.tsx\` that referenced an unregistered rule and was failing CI lint since 1.0.7.

releases.author: icarian-systems
releases.description:
Follow-up patch to the 1.0.6/1.0.7 "+ Add card" fixes. The earlier patches chased an inline-editor focus race; the real cause was that the new card was hidden by \`display:none\` before focus could ever matter.

### Fixed

- **"+ Add card" on a board with empty placeholders no longer creates invisible cards.** The board-level filter-visibility CSS (\`HiddenCardsStyle\`) hid any card present in \`totalCardIds\` but absent from \`visibleCardIds\`. \`visibleCardIds\` came from \`applyFilter\`, which excludes empty placeholder cards — even when no filter is active — so a new "+ Add card" placeholder was \`display:none\`'d the instant it was created. The card bumped the lane count but stayed invisible, and being \`display:none\` could not take editor focus or fire its discard-on-blur, so empty placeholders piled up (lane chip climbing "8", "9"… over an empty-looking lane). Placeholder cards are now always included in the visibility set; saved-view and masthead counts stay content-only.

releases.author: icarian-systems
releases.description:
Follow-up patch to the 1.0.6 "+ Add card" fix.

- **"+ Add card" reliably opens the inline editor on the new card.** The previous fix still relied on a `kanban-pro:focus-new-card` window event dispatched via `setTimeout(0)`. Because the column re-renders synchronously but the new card's listener only registers after paint, the event fired before any listener existed and was lost — so the new card stayed blank and looked invisible. The creation intent is now passed as an `autoFocusOnMount` prop, evaluated synchronously at render time, so the card's mount effect opens the editor every time.

releases.author: icarian-systems
releases.description:
First-time-user QA pass — no new features; this release makes existing (advertised) features actually work and removes a pervasive interruption.

Highlights:
- **Welcome modal** no longer re-appears after every board edit (it was tied to the metadata-cache refresh that fires on every write). Now auto-opens at most once per install.
- **Time tracking** is reachable again — the timer pill renders on cards and long-press / "Details" opens the history drawer. (A plugin-registry lookup used the wrong id, so the store resolved to null and the panel was never mounted.)
- **Calendar (.ics) export** now exports cards dated with `[due:: …]` and `📅`, not just `@{date}` — boards full of dated cards were exporting an empty calendar — and reports clearly when there's nothing to export.
- **Toolbar "Dashboard" button** opens the Dashboard.
- **Pro CTAs** land on the Pro settings pane instead of General.
- **Saved Views popover** reliably reopens, so custom filters can be saved as named views.
- **Recurrence field** keeps spaces ("every Monday" no longer becomes "everyMonday").
- Right-rail built-ins renamed **"Smart Views"**; unified Pro feature copy; card-details paywall no longer clips; lane/board counts respect the active filter.

Full details in [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/icarian-systems/kanban-pro-plugin/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).

releases.author: icarian-systems
releases.description: User-facing README rewrite (install steps, getting started, inline-metadata syntax, commands, settings, screenshots) with developer content moved to CONTRIBUTING.md. No functional code changes — main.js/styles.css behavior identical to 1.0.4.

releases.author: icarian-systems
releases.description: Resolves the remaining Obsidian automated-review CSS-lint warnings: removes all `!important` from the reduced-motion reset (now uses the CSS-variables route) and matches the README title to the manifest name (**Kanban for Professionals**). See CHANGELOG.md.

releases.author: icarian-systems
releases.description: Renames the directory display name to **Kanban for Professionals** and resolves the Obsidian automated-review warnings (manifest mismatch, builtin-modules dependency, partially-supported CSS, !important in editor overrides). See CHANGELOG.md for details. Plugin id remains `kanban-pro-boards`.

releases.author: icarian-systems
releases.description:
## Changed

- **Plugin `id` renamed to `kanban-pro-boards`** to clear a conflict in Obsidian's submission registry that blocked the community-plugin listing. The on-disk index cache path now derives from `configDir` + `manifest.id` at runtime, so it always follows the real install folder.
- **Display name** updated to "Kanban Pro, for the professional".

releases.author: icarian-systems
releases.description:
Kanban Pro 1.0.1 — initial public release.

**Install manually:** download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/kanban-pro/` folder, then enable the plugin in Obsidian's Community plugins settings.

- Free: Board / Table / List views, embeds, basic templates, validator.
- Pro: Recurrence, Saved Views, time tracking, calendar export, dashboard. [Get a license ($5.99 lifetime, limited time)](https://icarian-systems.lemonsqueezy.com/checkout/buy/d404fb1f-3961-4a3a-9715-8eb4d784fa5e).
